executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned gates green. External owner-loop residue keeps whole-stack certification from being green.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Resolve external marketing independent-verification staleness and blocked-channel-recovery timeout before certifying whole stack.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

findings.title: Marketing remains externally red on outcome evidence
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification still fails closed because primary-repo adoption is measurement-pending.
findings.root_cause: Outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption is still missing.
findings.recommended_fix: Let the marketing owner loop produce fresh measurable outcome evidence, then rerun marketing independent verification.

findings.title: blocked-channel-recovery cron has 692 consecutive timeout failures
findings.mechanism: Job times out repeatedly; escalation is at critical level.
findings.root_cause: External channel probing hangs or the recovery path is exhausted.
findings.recommended_fix: External domain: requires channel-side unblock or recovery-path redesign.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path is green on freshness and ownership gates
findings.mechanism: Independent verification passed with qualified_pass; verifier returns ok.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates healthy; remaining risk is external.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep independent verification tied to fresh runtime evidence on each watchdog run.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology is clean: 26 enabled, 0 disabled
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection confirms coherence.
findings.root_cause: Topology is stable; no drift from persisted history.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep direct cron inspection as source of truth on each run.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Resolve blocked-channel-recovery timeout loop (692 consecutive failures, critical escalation)
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Highest-volume recurring failure; external domain but consuming scheduler capacity.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Eliminates the dominant noise source in health monitor.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get a fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing still blocks whole-stack certification; artifact is 64+ hours stale.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed ownership.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Re-ran independent_verify.py → qualified_pass with 2 external blockers noted.
Re-ran verifier → ok, no architecture errors, independent artifact current.
External blockers (marketing fail, blocked-channel-recovery timeout) correctly classified as external-owned.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.
external_blockers: marketing independent verification is not pass: 'fail'

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: blocked-channel-recovery: 692 consecutive timeouts at critical escalation
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Dominant recurring failure; consumes scheduler capacity and masks other issues in health monitor.

notes: Architecture green = architecture-owned verifier path is coherent; does not mean whole stack green.
Live Gateway topology: 26 jobs, 26 enabled, 0 disabled.
Two external blockers remain: blocked-channel-recovery timeout (692 repeats, critical) and marketing independent verification stale (64+h).
No live timeout-budget repair was needed this watchdog run.
